title: Casual Tinkering
description: A simple mod that adds tools for Tinkers' Construct
body:
# Casual Tinkering

Casual Tinkering is an addon for Tinkers' Construct that introduces two unique tools: the Circular Saw and the Magic Device.

## 1.12.2 Version (Forge)

### Circular Saw
A powerful and versatile hybrid tool designed to enhance both woodcutting and combat.

**Features**
- **Hybrid Tool:** Crafted from two Tough Tool Rods, a Large Plate, and a Pan.
- **Efficient Woodcutting:** Functions as a highly efficient Hatchet for felling trees—offering greater speed and durability than standard axes.
- **Melee Combat:** Serves as a formidable weapon with a unique charged attack.
- **Charged Sweeping:** Hold right-click to wind up and unleash consecutive wide-arc strikes in a frontal cone, perfect for crowd control.
- **Precision Sawing (Modifier):** 5× Compass – Logs that can be processed into planks drop as planks instead.
- **Overclock (Modifier):** 5× Redstone Comparator – Increases damage dealt to secondary targets during sweeping attacks.

### Magic Device
A mystical sword that summons magical swords to assist in combat.

**Features**
- **Ranged Strike:** Hold right‑click to charge for 1.5 seconds, conjuring two magic swords that fly toward the targeted enemy, each dealing 50% of the weapon's base damage as magic damage.
- **Full‑Cooldown Bonus:** When you land a hit with a fully cooled main‑hand attack, an additional magic sword is summoned.
- **Off‑Hand Synergy:** While held in the off‑hand, any main‑hand sword (vanilla or Tinkers') that strikes a creature will automatically summon a magic sword to assist.
- **Armor Penetration & Invincibility Frames:** Magic swords bypass armor and respect local invincibility frames to avoid chain‑resistance issues.
- **Auto Device (Modifier):** 4× Redstone Repeater + Redstone Torch – Automatically strikes nearby hostile mobs when held in main hand.
- *Inspired by Toram Online.*

### Requirements (1.12.2)
- Minecraft 1.12.2
- Forge
- Tinkers' Construct 2
- Mantle

## 1.20.1 Version (Forge)

- **Circular Saw:** Rewritten with data‑driven parts; adds Sawing modifier, casting support.
- **Throwing Knife:** Disposable ammunition (stacks to 16, short charge, sticks in blocks).
- **Thermal Ray Modifier:** Fires a heat ray using liquid fuel; overheats after 10 shots.
- **Magic Sword modifiers:** Control, Auto, Coop variants for different playstyles.

**Requires:** Minecraft 1.20.1, Forge, Tinkers' Construct 3, Mantle, Json Things.

> **Note:** Some content has been ported from the 1.12.2 version of **Tinkers' Gadgets**

---

**License:** MIT (all versions). The mod JAR contains a `LICENSE.txt` file.

> **Note:** Portions of the 1.12.2 version were generated with the assistance of AI tools. Some Java code in the 1.20.1 version was also AI‑assisted.
